title: Aesthetic Seating
description: The mod is about everything you can sit on: chairs, sofas, stools, armchairs, benches, and even rugs. With each update, a new one will be added.
body:
Aesthetic Seating adds many cool and elaborate decorations for sitting like chairs, sofas, benches, etc. Now you can really sit in aesthetic way!)

![Mod Cover Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac32292f50725c7da134c26da501a523a1fde894_0.webp)

If you wanna more seating furniture you can check out my mods that add wonderful new trees and other interesting stuff.

[![Arboreal Nature link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb219391aa8cf79057f2c736395e069ed3382279.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arboreal-nature)
[![Wild Fields link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07d027cb7938c202918e14bf6828d23475920db1.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wild-fields)

[![Ko-fi link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd32bda2dbe27a0b4100056a8e7f54e83e98f7fc.png)](https://ko-fi.com/almiris)
[![Patreon link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e95a1a4d85b20de6b1f942286f9b43793d1c6dc.png)](https://www.patreon.com/c/Almiris)
[![CurseForge link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e13c79f563423cc2402a14b79f9cbe456020321.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aesthetic-seating)

Every 0.X update will give the new seating furniture for mod. There are simple but elaborate chairs with 0.1.0 version.

![0.6.0 Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/750b6f893b239a6ab071cb9625cf967d8f6ba8cd_0.webp)

![0.5.0 Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fba25e6cf74840728ff81c4025baa7f1b7deec94_0.webp)

![0.4.0 Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9a65ad5b58378c553f3a3f7a378f5fe1a9342e2_0.webp)

![0.3.0 Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4d6b05eaef4587cbbdc917e6d73aef9610e61a3.jpeg)

![0.2.0 Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bedd7672f41145dec76e431c6c5a2be7584327d5_0.webp)

![0.1.0 Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43f9d17dfc8bc511e2b6195e710b3e0d13d3592d.png)

## Future Plans
- Adding more simple but interesting mechanics to work with seating furnitures
- Adding more chair variants, sofas, benches, even new carpets, etc
